summary: All five requirements (REQ-40 through REQ-44) appear to be implemented in the diff. The Contact page has 'Join Us' and 'Contact Us' buttons with correct URLs and target attributes. The Footer has social media links (Facebook, Twitter/X, YouTube) under a 'Follow Us' label, plus a 'Join Us' link in the navigation section. The Navbar has a 'Join Us' external button in both desktop and mobile menus. The Homepage has a FEATURED_NOTICE constant with the correct article title and URL. Minor uncertainty exists due to truncation of some files, but the file summaries confirm all features are present.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated 'Connect' column added to the footer with Join Us, Contact Us, Facebook, X, and YouTube links as a separate fourth column, beyond what was explicitly requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement asked for social links grouped in a 'Follow Us' subsection and a 'Join Us' link in the existing navigation links section, not a brand-new dedicated 'Connect' column. The file summary describes this additional column which was not part of the spec.
